name: Claude Code Dev Container
postCreateCommand: git config --global core.eol lf && git config --global core.autocrlf input && git config --global user.name 'bot' && git config --global user.email 'bot-claude-code@datamlops.com' && npm install -g @anthropic-ai/claude-code@2.1.104 && export DISABLE_AUTOUPDATER=1 && bash -lc 'if [ -x ./.devcontainer/init-claude-onboarding.sh ]; then ./.devcontainer/init-claude-onboarding.sh; else s=$(find /workspaces -maxdepth 4 -type f -path "*/.devcontainer/init-claude-onboarding.sh" | head -n1); if [ -n "$s" ]; then "$s"; fi; fi'
postStartCommand: bash -lc 'if [ -x ./.devcontainer/start-db-proxy-service.sh ]; then ./.devcontainer/start-db-proxy-service.sh; else s=$(find /workspaces -maxdepth 4 -type f -path "*/.devcontainer/start-db-proxy-service.sh" | head -n1); if [ -n "$s" ]; then "$s"; fi; fi'
